name: ScanForge
overview: ScanForge is an open ATPG and scan-compression research platform. It pairs a classical PODEM engine with a learned decision-ordering model that steers backtracking, cutting pattern count while holding stuck-at and transition coverage.
objectives: Reach >99% stuck-at coverage with 30% fewer patterns than baseline
Expose a scriptable Python API for reproducible experiments
Ship a diagnosis mode for silicon failure localization

name: Quantaris
tagline: Hybrid computing platform bridging molecular and digital systems
overview: Quantaris is NoETHER-X Labs' flagship hybrid-computing research platform, investigating the convergence of molecular computing and conventional digital systems. It aims to establish foundational technologies for the next generation of hybrid computational platforms.
objectives: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) for molecular and hybrid computation
DNA computing simulation and molecular logic systems
Hybrid hardware architectures spanning analog, digital, and molecular substrates
Computational models and frameworks for future computing

name: OpenFlow-X
tagline: Reproducible RTL-to-GDS flow for open silicon
overview: OpenFlow-X orchestrates open-source EDA tools into a fully reproducible RTL-to-GDS flow with ML surrogates that predict congestion and timing before placement, reducing design iterations.
objectives: One-command RTL-to-GDS on open PDKs
Congestion prediction within 8% of router ground truth
Chiplet-aware partitioning front-end

name: SparseCore
overview: SparseCore is a research accelerator with a reconfigurable dataflow and a sparse tensor engine that skips zero work at the datapath level, targeting efficient inference for structured-sparse models.
objectives: 2x energy efficiency over dense baseline on structured sparsity
Compiler that maps common models to the dataflow
Open RTL + cycle-accurate simulator

name: TrustScan
tagline: Hardware Trojan detection over DFT infrastructure
overview: TrustScan reuses existing scan and compression infrastructure to detect hardware Trojans through side-channel and structural signatures, adding trust verification without dedicated silicon overhead.
objectives: Detect representative Trojan benchmarks via scan side-channels
Sub-1% area overhead on the target design
Integrate cleanly with ScanForge patterns

name: HelixStore
overview: HelixStore explores encoding schemes for archival data storage in synthetic DNA, prioritizing resilience to synthesis and sequencing errors over raw density.
objectives: Encode/decode pipeline with tunable redundancy
Recover from realistic insertion/deletion error rates
Open dataset of encoded test payloads

name: NoETHER-X: The Forgotten Code
tagline: Turning science into immersive music, art, and education
overview: The Forgotten Code transforms mathematics, artificial intelligence, semiconductor engineering, physics, and emerging technologies into immersive music, visual art, educational videos, and digital experiences that make complex scientific concepts engaging and accessible.
objectives: Produce educational video series on core research themes
Compose and release original science-inspired music and visual art
Build interactive multimedia experiences for public engagement
Establish a consistent digital brand and visual identity for the lab
